description:
India Book (IB) II, 16: Letter from Madmun b. Ḥasan, in Aden, to Avraham Ben Yiju. Dating: 1133–40 CE. 
This is the scribe's copy of Maḍmūn's original found in T-S NS J5 + T-S 13J7.13 + T-S K25.252 (IB II, 17-19; PGPID 5427). Avraham Ben Yiju reused the blank space on verso for a calendar for the years 1458–61 Seleucid = 1146–60 CE. Join: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: ספר הודו II,16: העתק מכתב ממדמון בן חסן לאברהם בן יג'ו, 1133-40, עם לוח שנה שנוסף בגב
